word: H7240 - רִבֹּו - ribbôw - rib-bo' - [idiom] ten thousand times ten thousand

sections.paragraph: Short Definition: [idiom] ten thousand times ten thousand

Original: רבּו

Transliteration: ribbô

Phonetic: rib-bo'

BDB Definition:

  1. myriad, ten thousand times ten thousand

Origin: corresponding to H7239

TWOT entry: 2984b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
